case_title: MARCELO, FREDERICK VS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY MARCELO, FREDERICK AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-15-2007 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARCELO, FREDERICK IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM IS BARRED BY THE APPLICABLE STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS, AS WELL AS PLAINTIFF'S FAILURE TO TIMELY FILE A GOVERNMENT CLAIM. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CHANGE OF ADDRESS FOR DEFT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, FILED.
